subject: A human soldier mid-leap from a mountain cliff, arms thrown wide, riding the wind on a feathered hang-glider rig strapped to their back
description: A dark-haired figure in light leather and cloth garb launches forward off a high mountain ridge, arms spread in joyful abandon. Strapped to their back is a wide hang-glider made of stitched hide and feathered wings, framing them like a giant raptor's silhouette. Below and behind, jagged blue peaks stretch into a hazy daylight sky streaked with cirrus clouds. The palette is dominated by sky-blues, the warmer earth-tones of the figure's clothing and the glider's tan webbing reading as the only break from the cool atmosphere. The mood is exhilarated, weightless, freefall-bright.
foreground: leaping human soldier with feathered hang-glider apparatus, arms outstretched, mid-jump
background: vast mountain range under a pale blue sky with thin cloud streaks; distant peaks recede into haze
emotion: exhilarated, fearless, mid-laugh; arms-wide commitment to the jump
